Video.summary: TFH celebrates Alfred Hitchcock and the masterful storytelling that still keeps audiences on the edge of their seats.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: These women play for keeps in the darkest alleys of noir cinema.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From smoldering glances to deadly betrayals, these thrillers show just how far desire can push the human heart.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: When horror wears an alluring face, loyalties blur and desire becomes the deadliest curse of all.
Video.grandparentTitle: Fatale Femmes Vol. 3: Daughters of Darkness
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Director Eli Roth presents a wild ride through cult horror, shocking exploitation, and vintage sci-fi.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Explore the dark side of scientific ambition, where unhinged minds push the boundaries of big screen horror.
Video.grandparentTitle: Mad, Mad, Mad Scientists Vol. 2: The Perils of Playing God
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Reckless experiments lead to monstrous results in these horrific Hollywood cult hits.
Video.grandparentTitle: Mad, Mad, Mad Scientists Vol. 3: Experiments Gone Awry
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A gripping collection of noir classics, where crime, corruption, and fate collide on the big screen.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hardboiled & Haunted: The Art of Noir Cinema
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Step into the world of horror and sci-fi master John Carpenter with this spine-tingling look at some of his most celebrated films.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Witness the greatest slashers in cinema history, from Crystal Lake to Elm Street to the Bates Motel and more.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: High-octane tales of rebels, renegades, and road warriors burning rubber on the big screen.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A doctor experimenting with transplant techniques keeps his girlfriend's head alive when she is decapitated in a car crash, then goes hunting for a new body.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: ‘Shaft,” and “Foxy Brown” all rolled out to the “Car Wash” with “Sweet Sweetbacks Badasss Song” on the radio!
Video.title: Bad Ass Blaxploitation

Video.summary: Your favorite filmmakers pull their favorite noir films out of the shadows.
Video.title: Film Noir: The Dark Corner of Cinema

Film Noir: The Dark Corner of Cinema

Video.summary: TFH creator Joe Dante pays tribute to the classic creature features that inspired a generation of filmmakers.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Take a journey into the future with this collection of celebrated classic sci-fi action movies.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In space, only the people sitting next to you can hear you scream. So scream loud!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Three directors. Three unique styles. Three incredible legacies.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From Bullitt to Bad Lieutenant, filmmakers discuss cops that kick ass on the big screen.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From the past to the future, laying down the law comes easy to these big screen cops!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Five films. One legacy. Here's why Clint Eastwood's Harry Callahan is a Hollywood legend.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: These heist and detective classics explore the moral ambiguity and dark psychology of the criminal underworld.
Video.grandparentTitle: Crime Doesn't Pay Vol. 1: The Criminal Code
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: It's an action bonanza of cops, robbers, and vengeance in these crime and exploitation hits.
Video.grandparentTitle: Crime Doesn't Pay Vol. 2: Grit and Glory
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Betrayal, justice, and moral complexity are on the menu in these moody and violent crime flicks.
Video.grandparentTitle: Crime Doesn't Pay Vol. 3: The Dark Side of Justice
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Celebrating the bold storytelling, unforgettable characters, and cultural impact of Black cinema.
Video.grandparentTitle: Rebels, Icons, and Revolution: A Journey Through Black Cinema
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Step inside a world of streetwise anti-heroes, rebels, and genre-defining Black filmmakers who did things their own way.
Video.grandparentTitle: Street Kings: Icons, Outlaws, and Originals
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From socially charged dramas to alternate realities, these are the films that defined decades of Black culture.
Video.grandparentTitle: Legends of Black Cinema: Stories That Break the System
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From Shaft to Coffy to Truck Turner and more, celebrating the best action films of the Blaxploitation genre.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Lola Falana stars as a mob moll who finds herself in the crosshairs of killers when she agrees to testify against her boyfriend.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: TFH creator Joe Dante celebrates the noir classics that explore themes of identity, paranoia, and duality.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Stung by the thought of losing her cosmetics empire, a woman goes to extreme and horrific lengths to find a cure for aging.
Video.title: The Wasp Woman

Video.summary: Six NFL superstars tackle the big screen as a biker gang seeking revenge on the racist thugs who killed one member’s brother.
Video.title: The Black Six

Video.summary: Gone for two years, Mary (Ava Gardner) returns to her hometown and finds herself caught up in a deadly scheme involving her former lover (George Raft) and his nightclub owner rival (Tom Conway). Based on the 1941 novel by Maritta M. Wolff, Whistle Stop was a box office hit in 1946.
Video.title: Whistle Stop
